headline: Home Depot launches game-changing feature for certain customers
summary: When a retailer is struggling, it has several choices to address the situation: continue its current strategies and hope the business climate changes, pivot from its original track to answer evolving demands and hopefully pull through, or give up and shut its doors for good. headline: These 4 ETFs Generate $6,000 a Year in Monthly Income for Retirement Investors
summary: Four ETFs, each yielding above 6%, each paying monthly. On a $100,000 investment spread across these funds, the income math works out to more than $6,000 a year before taxes. That kind of cash flow is what income investors are hunting for, especially with the 10-year Treasury sitting at 4.13% and the Fed Funds Rate ...
